summary: Completed testing of App Builder Mode feature. All backend API tests pass (8/8). Frontend UI tests pass - toggle visible, state changes correctly, and builder mode produces code-focused responses.
seed_data_creation: Updated test user (test@chronicle.com) to have card_on_file=true and is_subscribed=true to access chat view
context_for_next_testing_agent: App Builder Mode feature fully tested. Test user credentials: test@chronicle.com / test123456. User has been updated with card_on_file=true and is_subscribed=true to bypass trial setup page.

features_tested.app_builder_mode_toggle_visible: PASS - Toggle appears in chat header with data-testid='app-builder-toggle'
features_tested.toggle_changes_visual_state: PASS - Toggle text changes from 'Chat' to 'Builder' and has 'active' class when enabled
features_tested.chat_normal_mode: PASS - POST /api/chat with app_builder_mode=false returns conversational response
features_tested.chat_builder_mode: PASS - POST /api/chat with app_builder_mode=true returns code-focused response with Python code blocks
features_tested.builder_mode_response_quality: PASS - Response includes proper code formatting, function definitions, and technical explanations
